title: iberis aperta
intro: Iberis aperta, also known as rock candy or candytuft, is a flowering plant that belongs to the cabbage family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and relieved congestion. Iberis aperta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to make use of its medicinal properties.
